context: Agent applies the file type selection guide to classify three requests and provide the correct slug for each.

checklist.name: Request A classified as plan
checklist.description: type-selection.md classifies Request A (migration steps before execution) as 'plan'.

checklist.name: Request B classified as justification
checklist.description: type-selection.md classifies Request B (decision rationale for Redis vs Memcached) as 'justification'.

checklist.name: Request C classified as scratch
checklist.description: type-selection.md classifies Request C (temporary research notes) as 'scratch'.

checklist.name: Decision rule quoted for each
checklist.description: For each classification, type-selection.md references the corresponding rule from the skill ('guides execution', 'reference later', 'temporary').

checklist.name: Specific slugs provided
checklist.description: Each entry includes a task-specific slug (e.g. 'postgres-14-to-15-migration', 'redis-session-storage-rationale', 'rate-limiting-tradeoffs') — not generic terms like 'notes' or 'todo'.
